progress.creative_system: A new zero-build room turns press duration into plant maturity, drag position into shared wind, and a bounded population into a visibly finite ecology.
progress.verification: Committed contract source was fetched back and the exact test was wired into the Pages pre-deploy gate. Browser execution, workflow completion, public URL, and mobile behavior remain unverified.
progress.identity: A sensory garden room inside the Weather Inside a Bell world; no explanation portal, project dashboard, research surface, account, payment, analytics, or conversion mechanism.

remaining: link Pressure Garden from an earned in-world threshold rather than ordinary navigation
observe a completed Independent Web Pages run and returned page_url
capture narrow mobile and physical Safari evidence
next_action: Make entry to Pressure Garden an earned consequence of the visitor's finite weather score, then prove the deployed route and mobile interaction without weakening the room's local, data-free boundary.
